free_text: Characterization of high-energy quasi-monoenergetic
neutron energy spectra and ambient dose equivalents of
80-389 MeV 7Li(p,n) reactions using a time-of-flight
method
Research Reactor Institute
Shimizu Corporation, Tokyo
Research Center for Nuclear Physics (RCNP)
Cyclotron and Radioisotope Center
Department of Accelerator Science, Graduate
University for Advanced Studies (SOKENDAI),
Tsukuba
Beam intensity is 5 to 60 nA.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness: 1.0 cm
RCNP ring cyclotron
NE213 organic liquid scintillator
detection efficiency: 10% for neutron
energies less than 80 MeV and 15% for
those greater than 80 MeV (10-15%)
less than 1% for peak neutrons and less
than 3% for the continuum (1-3%)
Aiganym
Received by e-mail from Y.Iwamoto
ANG is polar angle (lab.) between beam and neutron
